name: fact-gate
title: Fact Gate
summary: Verify every factual, legal, or financial claim against a dated primary source before anything ships.
description: Extracts the checkable claims from a draft, blocks until each is matched to a dated primary source, and flags claim-classes a casual self-check misses (rates, phase-out limits, deadlines, jurisdiction/forum).
author: Warden Curated Pack

task.description: The text/draft whose claims must be verified.
